mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fd_department_change_log (id, department_id, change_time, operator, field_name, field_label, old_value, new_value) VALUES (#{id}, #{departmentId}, #{changeTime}, #{operator}, #{fieldName}, #{fieldLabel}, #{oldValue}, #{newValue})
mapper.select: SELECT id, department_id, change_time, operator, field_name, field_label, old_value, new_value FROM fd_department_change_log WHERE department_id = #{departmentId} ORDER BY change_time DESC
